data.reasoning: Both models failed to analyze the critical PKGBUILD file due to incorrect binary file detection, leaving all build/install logic unexamined. No actual security analysis was performed.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (critical build script) was incorrectly skipped as binary
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (build commands, install hooks, dependency handling) were missed
learnings: Improve binary file detection - PKGBUILD should never be considered binary
Prioritize PKGBUILD analysis even if other files are skipped
Implement fallback checks for critical file misclassification
